description: AirDoubleObstacle: guards pass but player X is behind obstacle — no rect overlap, safe
source_trace: AirDoubleObstacle::collision: both guards pass, but currentCollisionArea(rect).intersectsRect(rectAir) == false for all 5 rects
note: Confirms guard-passing alone does not cause collision — rect check must also pass. X gap of 400 units ensures no overlap.
